headline: Woman's 'No New Clothes' Challenge Is Broken By An 'Emotional Support Sweater' She 'Needed'
summary: 'It was on sale,' Amanda said. 'You said no new clothes,' her friend said. 'The sale was a sign,' Amanda said.
fullBody: Amanda NoBuy committed to 'no new clothes for 30 days.' She lasted 3 days. 'I found an emotional support sweater,' Amanda said. 'It was on sale.' 'You broke the rules,' her friend said. 'The rules were flexible,' Amanda said. She has now bought 7 'emotional support' items this week. 'I'm supporting my emotions,' Amanda said. 'You're supporting the economy,' her friend said.
